special_mechanics.name: Morphing System
special_mechanics.description: Vectorman can morph into different creature forms by defeating specific enemies. Documented forms include: Scorpion (allows walking on hot surfaces without damage) and Rhinoceros Beetle (large horned head for ramming enemies into other targets). Forms provide different gameplay abilities.

special_mechanics.name: Weapon System
special_mechanics.description: Default shooting mechanism fires projectiles in a straight line. Weapon upgrades are collectable throughout levels and modify projectile damage and behavior.

tier_notes: Tier 2 empirical/qualitative data. No specific physics values documented in available sources. Game described as maintaining similarity to original Vectorman with traditional platformer movement mechanics. Sources reference gameplay description but not technical movement parameters.
